violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the front service area was lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2025

Raw shell eggs on top of the meat well observed held at 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Eggs were placed in refrigerator. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2025
Two staff members were observed without hair restraints at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024
